title: Integrate CSV import route and dashboard UI flow
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard route provides upload account-select review and conflict steps
Review UI supports manual row cleanup before final confirm
UI strings render from i18n dictionaries in de and en
Typecheck and component tests for new import UI pass
deliverables: new/updated dashboard import route and UI components
integration wiring to import/review server actions
tests for critical import UI states
completion_summary: Added /import dashboard flow with CSV upload, reconciliation/conflict resolution, staged row cleanup, confirm wiring, and import flow state tests.
